description: M3 deployment by pad, for a TRANSPORT (Battlewagon): the unit is selected from the right-panel list, A warps the cursor+ghost to the deployment zone and a second A places the huge rectangular base, cursor-clicking Confirm pops the transport embark dialog, and 'Deploy Without Embarking' completes the unit so the deployment turn alternates to player 1; B then parks the cursor. NOTE: the unit is selected deterministically via the list (not by bumper-cycling) because LB/RB are now the unit-cycling control during deployment placement (the BUMPER-ONLY rule) — LB no longer rotates the ghost, so a single LB press here would cycle to a different unit. This scenario's job is the transport + embark-dialog flow; RB/LB unit cycling is covered by pad_deploy_unit_cycling.

steps.script:
InputDeviceManager.claim_pad()
var list = tree.current_scene.unit_list
for i in range(list.item_count):
	if str(list.get_item_metadata(i)) == "U_BATTLEWAGON_G":
		list.select(i)
		list.item_selected.emit(i)
		return true
return false
